_comment: RP-60: incremental mutation testing scoped to the committed workflow executors. Opt-in via `just mutate`; NOT part of the default `just ci` gate. Command: scripts/check-workflow-sync.test.js only. scripts/workflow-truth-contract.test.js is instrumentation-incompatible BY DESIGN: it asserts on raw executor source (meta-first guard requires `export const meta` as the literal first statement, and extractFunction snippets reference Stryker helpers injected at file top), so it fails every sandbox dry run; see .scratch/integration-queue/rp-60.md for the queued follow-up. babel.config.cjs supplies allowReturnOutsideFunction for the dual-runtime executor dialect (export const meta + top-level return). Incremental state + sandbox live under the already-gitignored .cache/.
